properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v3 v3 v3 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You saw me in my need You paid the price for me And through Your love I have been set free. Now, I am not the same You took my sin and shame Forever, I will bless your holy name.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I adore You, I adore You, Lamb of God, my Savior, Prince of Peace. I adore You, I adore You Jesus, You mean all the world to me. (I adore You Lord)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I adore You, I adore You, Lamb of God, my Savior, Prince of Peace. I adore You, I adore You Jesus, You mean all the world to me.
